title: Lavender Smoked Quesadilla Applesauce
description: A smoky and fluffy brunch dish featuring applesauce, smoke, egg-free-friendly, served on a cedar plank.
instructions: Combine queso fresco, lemon juice, honey, and salt in a bowl.
Core the apples and mix them with fresh lavender buds. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper if needed.
Lay apple mixture on one half of each quesadilla shell.
Dab some olive oil or butter over each side of the cedar plank for smoking.
Place quesadillas face down on the plank, close them together, cover, and smoke over medium heat for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on both sides.
Turn off the heat but keep covered to prevent cooling. Allow to cool slightly before slicing into wedges.
Serve with apple sauce alongside for a complete meal.
